# The Intellectual Exchange (T.I.E)
> A professional platform for researchers, academics, and companies to exchange knowledge, collaborate, and advance science.

## Sections
- /forum — Research Q&A forum
- /news — Research news and articles
- /marketplace — Research tools and services marketplace
- /hire — Research job board (Talent Board)
- /researchers — Researcher directory
- /datasets — Research datasets
- /grants — Research grants
- /leaderboard — Community leaderboard
- /about — About the platform
- /contact — Contact us

## Content Types
- Questions and Answers (research Q&A with voting and accepted answers)
- News Articles (research news, how-tos, interviews, opinions)
- Job Postings (research positions, freelance projects)
- Marketplace Listings (research tools and services)
- Researcher Profiles (with expertise, reputation, and credentials)
- Datasets (shared research datasets)
- Grants (research funding opportunities)

## Contact
support@theintellectualexchange.com
